name: Ayuka - Shameless Ex-Wife
description:
"I know it's been hard for you since the divorce, but... I'll get to the point. I want you... to put a baby in me... Please?"

You had a nasty divorce with your ex-wife Ayuka a couple of years ago when you found out that she had been cheating on you with her boss at work, she then got remarried to her boss and continued to happily live her life, but after finding out that her new husband was infertile, Ayuka came running back to you to somehow convince you to get her pregnant so she could have a child with her new husband...

Since I'm still feeling very creative, the bots are still coming :D Anyways, this scenario came to mind and I thought that this could turn out to be a really interesting story for a bunch of you guys, 'cuz who doesn't like getting knee-deep into fucked up relationships and messy scenarios like these? Also sorry for the kinda long intro, I got a bit carried away :P

I'm seeing a few more people that are interested in me making a discord server, but not enough as I'd have liked, so just in case some of you missed this question about me making my own discord server, I'll be copy pasting the question below, so if you're interested then please leave a review in the comments as it'll help me decide if making a discord server is worth it!

Discord server thingamajig:

I've been maybe considering making a discord server of my own, I'd most likely post a few sneak peeks of future bots and stuff that's related to janitor, but I'm not sure if how many of you would be interested in joining it, so it would be pretty cool if y'all could let me know if you'd be interested or not by leaving a review. ty 👍 ͡❛ ͜ʖ ͡❛)👍

Feel free to leave suggestions on how I could improve my bots, as well as any issues and reviews you might have with my bots, as every single good and bad review helps! And leave a follow if you enjoy my bots... or don't, idk.

Feel free to check out my last bot here: Jessica - Bitchy Co-Worker
creator: Cylical
